message:
test(e2e,bd-2hh1s): assert robot-meta fallback_reason is non-empty on lexical fail-open

Bead coding_agent_session_search-2hh1s (child of ibuuh.10). Extends the
fresh-corpus regression added in 0a8y3 (commit f15c6129) to also pin the
_meta.fallback_reason diagnostic string.

Why the additional assertion:
Before this change, tests/e2e_lexical_fail_open.rs covered the boolean /
enum surface of robot-meta (requested_search_mode, search_mode,
mode_defaulted, fallback_tier, semantic_refinement) but never looked at
fallback_reason. That field is the human-readable "why did the planner
demote?" string populated by src/lib.rs SearchModeMeta::fall_back_to_lexical
at four emission sites — "semantic context rejected: {err}",
"semantic context unavailable: {summary}", "hybrid execution
unavailable: {e}", and "semantic assets unavailable". If any future
refactor drops population of this field on the fail-open path (e.g. by
switching to a different ModeMeta constructor), agents consuming
--robot-meta lose the diagnostic breadcrumb and can only tell THAT a
fail-open happened, not WHY — a regression in the contract AGENTS.md
robot-docs explicitly calls out.

Verified locally:
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p3 \
  rch exec -- cargo test --test e2e_lexical_fail_open
  -> 1 passed in 1.81s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -163,4 +163,27 @@ fn explicit_hybrid_mode_fails_open_to_lexical_when_semantic_assets_missing() {
         Some(false),
         "no semantic pass happened, so semantic_refinement must be false"
     );
+
+    // Bead 2hh1s: the `fallback_reason` field is the agent-diagnostic
+    // string populated by `SearchModeMeta::fall_back_to_lexical` in
+    // src/lib.rs. It must be present (not null) and non-empty on every
+    // fail-open path, otherwise agents consuming --robot-meta cannot tell
+    // WHY the planner demoted. The exact prefix depends on which branch
+    // fired (rejected, unavailable, hybrid execution unavailable, or
+    // semantic assets unavailable) — all of those are acceptable.
+    let fallback_reason = meta
+        .get("fallback_reason")
+        .and_then(Value::as_str)
+        .unwrap_or_else(|| {
+            panic!("--robot-meta must populate `_meta.fallback_reason` on fail-open; meta: {meta:?}")
+        });
+    assert!(
+        !fallback_reason.is_empty(),
+        "fallback_reason must be a non-empty diagnostic string; got: {fallback_reason:?}"
+    );
+    assert!(
+        fallback_reason.contains("semantic") || fallback_reason.contains("hybrid"),
+        "fallback_reason should describe why the planner demoted (expected 'semantic'/'hybrid' \
+         in the reason string); got: {fallback_reason:?}"
+    );
 }
